case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. FRANCIS ALBINANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBINANA, FRANCIS $4,279.20 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,324.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
